headline: Bio-Techne (TECH) Stock Valuation After New Refeyn Bispecific Antibody Analysis Collaboration
summary: Bio-Techne (TECH) has drawn fresh investor interest after teaming up with Refeyn on a four hour integrated workflow that links charge heterogeneity, molecular weight, and aggregation in bispecific antibodies and biosimilars at single molecule resolution. See our latest analysis for Bio-Techne. That Refeyn collaboration has landed at a time when momentum in Bio-Techne’s share price has picked up, with a 1 month share price return of 29.7% and a 90 day gain of 10%, even though the year to date...
